theme: /commons bands 1-2 hi-fi — image-led Direction-B hero + SubnetworkCard extraction + grid craft
operator_scope: bespoke hero: research-fed prompts + direct visual inspection + blind persona panel; regenerate until it WOWs the reviewers (MAX-III)

iii_7step.measure: Baseline = c160 scaffold (sparse text hero + inline grid markup/styles). /commons already at build-clean, 91 gates, axe 0 AA, LH 100s. Below-target dims (agent-assessable): hero is text-only (not image-led per cycle theme); cards are scaffold markup with no hover/provenance craft; Trust/Provenance citation present in data but unrendered (E4 Gap #5).
iii_7step.orient: Reference-inspection (commons lens) over the complete M5.8 exemplar set — HF (named people > vanity metrics), Val Town (who-not-how-many), ethereum (credibility anchor + low-barrier). Lesson: named stewards + one cited mission + one honest connect path = credible; logo soup + vanity metrics = not. Artifact: cycle_161_reference_synthesis.md.
iii_7step.select_iterate: Two targets: (1) bespoke image-led Direction-B hero; (2) extract SubnetworkCard with hover/lift + visible governance citation + AA cyan discipline. Grid craft folds into (2).
iii_7step.implement: Hero: authored e5_commons_hero_gen.py (Imagen-4.0 Ultra, python3.13, Keychain SS_GEMINI_API_KEY); 3 gen rounds (14 candidates, $0.52): r1 C1/C2/C3 motifs -> r2 C2R (panel deltas: individuate plots, natural connective tissue, calm sky) -> r3 C2R2 (forbid floating helix/glyphs). Winner sec_commons_r3_C2R2_v3 -> hero_commons.png, wired via HomeHero (title composited, no baked text). Card: new SubnetworkCard.astro (extracted markup + styles), hover/lift (reduced-motion guarded), framed 'Open governance' provenance anchor (member vault -> in-site /vaults/<slug>; closes E4 Gap #5 visibly without dumping internal repo paths), WF attribution+license preserved (ADR-002), cyan small-text AA on #24283b surface. commons.astro grid -> <SubnetworkCard/>; dead hero + .subnet-* styles removed.
iii_7step.re_measure: Build PASS 161pp/0 err (161 vs c160's 163 = prior commit c6aea4d dropped 2 archived vault pages, not this cycle). Gates 91/91 (incl. /commons a11y both modes + responsive x4 viewports). axe 0 WCAG-AA both modes on /commons. Lighthouse /commons 100/100/100/100 (desktop preset). Visual confirm: title legible over calm dark hero band; 4 cards render with provenance + WF attribution.
iii_7step.validate: All gates green; page count stable vs the post-c6aea4d baseline; Lighthouse categories all 100 (>= -1 hold); both improvement targets landed; commit-only posture honored (no deploy).

hero_selection.thesis: a commons, not a catalog — distinct individually-tended garden plots sharing one great living tree
hero_selection.panel: blind 4-lens (Design Critic / Newcomer / Community Lead / Movement Skeptic), independent, not primed
hero_selection.panel_r1_verdict: unanimous on the C2 garden direction (Newcomer 9, Community Lead 9, Design Critic 8, Movement Skeptic 6); Critic+Skeptic asked for a round to individuate plots, drop energy-beams, calm the sky, structuralize DNA
hero_selection.panel_confirm_verdict: Design Critic: 'WOW / shippable: YES'; Movement Skeptic: V3 is the ship pick, residual non-blocking nit = single cyan leaf-glow at trunk base (botanical, lower-center, outside title zone)
hero_selection.wow_gate: cleared (3/4 lenses ship/WOW; adversarial 4th picks V3 with one non-blocking note)
hero_selection.deferred_polish: anchor/neutralize the trunk-base leaf-glow on a future Ultra-quota day (Movement Skeptic non-blocking note); daily Imagen-Ultra quota (30/req) hit at r3 v4

embargo_finding: WilhelmAI + Rare Archive (Wilhelm-Foundation external-org) rendered under the operator-cleared ADR-010-window override; per-surface attribution + license shown on both cards (WilhelmAI ADR-002); commit-only until E5 close green-light.
